tasks.subject: Task 1: Write GETTING_STARTED.md and link from README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce the complete guide at the repo root and a discoverability link from `README.md`.

**Files:**
- Create: `GETTING_STARTED.md`
- Modify: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- File at repo root
- Paste-prompt code block at top, instructs stop at step 5/6 boundary
- API-credit callout present
- Sections 1-10 with correct headings in order
- Sections 1-6 each contain What/Run/Verify labels exactly once
- Mission template mentions worker_done
- Section 10 has three link bullets
- Line count 150-300
- No TBD/TODO/FILL ME IN/XXX/<insert
- README link line added

**Verify:** see plan doc Task 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GETTING_STARTED.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f GETTING_STARTED.md && [ \"$(wc -l < GETTING_STARTED.md)\" -ge 150 ] && [ \"$(wc -l < GETTING_STARTED.md)\" -le 300 ] && ! grep -E 'TBD|TODO|FILL ME IN|XXX|<insert' GETTING_STARTED.md && grep -q 'GETTING_STARTED.md' README.md && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file at repo root", "paste-prompt at top with step-5/6 stop", "credit callout", "sections 1-10 in order", "What/Run/Verify labels in sections 1-6", "mission template mentions worker_done", "section 10 three links", "line count 150-300", "no placeholders", "README link added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Dry-run the guide in a clean directory and fix issues
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Execute every `Verify` command in the guide against a freshly created scratch project; fix any issues found. Step 6 checked by --help only.

**Files:**
- Modify (only if dry-run finds issues): `GETTING_STARTED.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Every Verify in sections 1-5 passes in /tmp/orchestra-dryrun-<ts>
- orchestra run is NOT executed; only orchestra run --help
- Any guide bugs fixed; dry-run re-run until clean
- Scratch dir removed at end

**Verify:** dry-run script exits 0 ending with `=== Dry-run passed ===`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GETTING_STARTED.md"], "verifyCommand": "bash /tmp/orchestra-guide-dryrun.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every Verify in sections 1-5 passes", "orchestra run NOT executed; only --help", "guide bugs fixed and dry-run re-run until clean", "scratch dir removed"]}
```
